stories.title: Charles Schwab Challenge R1 UNDERWAY — Åberg Hunts First 2026 Win at Colonial
stories.angle: Åberg is the best player not winning in 2026. Can Colonial finally break the drought?

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
Colonial Country Club is OPEN.

Round 1 of the Charles Schwab Challenge is underway in Fort Worth.
Ludvig Åberg is the betting favorite — 6 top-10s, zero wins in 2026.

Today could be the day he changes that.

#GolfFanrecap #SchwabeChallenge #PGATour

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
Åberg at Colonial: solo-3rd in 2025. Betting favorite in 2026.
Six top-10s in seven starts this year — without a win.

Hogan's Alley has been kind to him. The question is: does it give him a title?

#GolfFanrecap #SchwabeChallenge #PGATour

stories.angle: DeChambeau looks to defend his Korea title from last year. The Crushers are on a roll.

x_posts.text:
LIV Golf Korea — Round 1 Leaders:

-5: DeChambeau / Charles Howell III / Scott Vincent
-4: Niemann / Poulter / Pieters

DeChambeau's Crushers GC lead the team standings at -10 cumulative.

#GolfFanrecap #LIVGolf #LIVGolfKorea

stories.title: Is It Finally Rickie Fowler's Time at Colonial?
stories.angle: Fowler's Colonial history is excellent. His current form is arguably the best it's been in years.

x_posts.label: Post 3
x_posts.text:
Rickie Fowler hasn't missed a cut at Colonial in 5 consecutive years.

3 top-10s in his last 4 starts in 2026.
13th trip to Hogan's Alley.

Is this FINALLY the week he ends the win drought?

#GolfFanrecap #SchwabeChallenge #PGATour

article.headline: Rickie Fowler at Colonial: History, Form, and the Case for Finally Breaking Through

stories.title: Åberg's Win Drought by the Numbers — 6 Top-10s, Zero Wins
stories.angle: The numbers say Åberg should be winning. The results say he isn't. Something will give soon.

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
Ludvig Åberg in 2026: 6 top-10s in 7 starts.

Strokes gained: elite.
Ball-striking: top of field.
Win total: zero.

Something has to give. Colonial is a great place for it to happen.

#GolfFanrecap #SchwabeChallenge #PGATour

stories.title: US Women's Open Preview — Historic First at Riviera (June 4-7)
stories.angle: Historic first at Riviera. Korda is the most in-form player. Thitikul is the ranking leader. Can Stark defend?

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
The US Women's Open heads to Riviera Country Club — for the FIRST TIME EVER.

June 4-7 | Pacific Palisades, CA | Presented by Ally

Korda: 3 wins in 2026. Thitikul: World No. 1. Stark: defending champ.

Historic venue. Historic field. #GolfFanrecap #USWomensOpen #LPGA
